Bash(python -c "import duckdb; c=duckdb.connect\(r'C:/Users/siddh/Desktop/spring 2026/580/BNPL/bnpl-pod/data/warehouse.duckdb', read_only=True\); print\('fred series_ids:'\); [print\(' ',r\) for r in c.execute\(\\"SELECT series_id, COUNT\(*\), MIN\(observed_at\), MAX\(observed_at\) FROM fred_series GROUP BY series_id ORDER BY series_id\\"\).fetchall\(\)]; print\('bsi_daily rows:', c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\), MIN\(observed_at\), MAX\(observed_at\) FROM bsi_daily'\).fetchone\(\)\); print\('abs_tranche rows:', c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\), MIN\(period_end\), MAX\(period_end\) FROM abs_tranche_metrics'\).fetchone\(\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import duckdb; c=duckdb.connect\(r'C:/Users/siddh/Desktop/spring 2026/580/BNPL/bnpl-pod/data/warehouse.duckdb', read_only=True\); print\('tables:'\); [print\(' ', r[0]\) for r in c.execute\(\\"SELECT table_name FROM duckdb_tables\(\) ORDER BY table_name\\"\).fetchall\(\)]; print\('regulatory catalysts:'\); [print\(' ',r\) for r in c.execute\('SELECT catalyst_id, deadline_date, materiality FROM regulatory_catalysts ORDER BY deadline_date'\).fetchall\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import duckdb; c=duckdb.connect\(r'C:/Users/siddh/Desktop/spring 2026/580/BNPL/bnpl-pod/data/warehouse.duckdb', read_only=True\); rows=c.execute\('SELECT run_id, as_of, llm_advisory FROM pod_decisions ORDER BY as_of DESC LIMIT 3'\).fetchall\(\); [print\(r[0], r[1], repr\(\(r[2] or ''\)[:300]\)\) for r in rows]")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('web/pod_snapshot.json','r',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('keys:', sorted\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('gate keys:', sorted\(d['gates'].keys\(\)\)\); print\('ladder:', len\(d['gates']['ladder']\), 'pills'\); print\('radar axes:', [a['key'] for a in d['radar']['axes']]\); print\('backtest windows:', [w['id'] for w in d['backtest']['windows']]\); print\('backtest panels:', sorted\(d['backtest']['series'].keys\(\)\)\); print\('per-panel points:', {k:len\(v\) for k,v in d['backtest']['series'].items\(\)}\); print\('agentLog sample:'\); print\(' ', d['agentLog'][0]\)")
